title: T-033 — SCN-040 Putaway UI (scan / suggest / done) (06-b)
prompt:
# T-033 — SCN-040 Putaway

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.2 FR-SC-FE-023/024
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:416-452 §3.9
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-putaway.jsx:5-63 (putaway_scan_screen), :65-144 (putaway_suggest_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver SCN-040 4-step putaway workflow (scan LP → suggest → optional override with reason_code → done) wired to T-030.

## Implementation contract
1. Routes /scanner/putaway, /scanner/putaway/[lpId]/suggest, /scanner/putaway/done.
2. Scan step renders mini-grid 2×3 (product, qty, expiry, current loc, batch, status) after LP scan.
3. Suggest step shows 28px monospace location code + strategy badge (FEFO/FIFO/PRODUCT/DEFAULT) + alternatives list.
4. Override flow: amber warn-banner + 5 reason_code options + free-text 'Inne'.
5. Done step renders from→to table + strategy used + override yes/no.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/putaway/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/putaway/[lpId]/suggest/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/putaway/done/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-040-putaway.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the 3 prototype screens render, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-putaway.jsx:5-63,65-144`, then the scan step shows the LP mini-grid 2×3, the suggest step shows a 28px monospace location code + strategy badge + alternatives list, and the override flow renders an amber warn-banner with 5 reason_code options + 'Inne' free text — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
2. Given the user scans the suggested location, when the confirm button is tapped, then a single POST /putaway is issued with override=false and the user is redirected to done
3. Given the user scans a different location and selects reason_code='space full', when confirm is tapped, then POST /putaway is issued with override=true and override_reason_code='space full' and the done step displays 'Override yes'

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-040-putaway.test.tsx asserting parity + matched submit + override submit before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-040-putaway'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow override submission without a reason_code
- Do not skip the LP mini-grid render after scan
- Do not navigate to done before /putaway returns 200

pipeline_inputs.description: SCN-040 putaway UI wired to suggest+execute APIs; renders override banner + reason_code picker.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) LP mini-grid 2×3 after LP scan.
2) Suggest screen with 28px monospace location code + strategy badge.
3) Alternatives list visible with expiry/loc.
4) Override path renders amber warn-banner + 5 reasons + 'Inne'.
5) Done step from→to table + strategy + override yes/no.
out_of_scope: Do not implement SSCC palet putaway (P2)
acceptance_criteria: Given the 3 prototype screens render, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-putaway.jsx:5-63 and :65-144, then the scan step shows the LP mini-grid 2×3, suggest shows 28px monospace location + strategy badge + alternatives list, and override flow renders amber warn-banner with 5 reason_code options + 'Inne' — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given the user scans the suggested location, when confirm is tapped, then a single POST /putaway is issued with override=false and the user is redirected to done

Given a different location is scanned and reason_code='space full' is selected, when confirm is tapped, then POST /putaway is issued with override=true and override_reason_code='space full' and done shows 'Override yes'
test_strategy: RED: write scn-040-putaway.test.tsx asserting parity + matched submit + override submit before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not allow override submission without reason_code
Do not skip mini-grid after LP scan
Do not navigate to done before 200
